name: synthwave
description: SynthWave — write, simulate, lint, and synthesize Verilog/SystemVerilog. Runs in-browser (WebAssembly), against a local server, or as a self-contained desktop app.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
